description_long: This airplane features a slender fuselage with a predominantly light purple and pink color scheme, accented by brown, leaf-like appendages that extend from the wings and tail. The wings are long and thin, with organic, jagged edges that resemble foliage, giving the aircraft a unique, nature-inspired appearance. The cockpit is positioned at the front and is slightly raised, with a smooth, rounded canopy. The tail section is adorned with additional leaf-like structures, and the vertical stabilizer is split into two upward-curving elements. The landing gear appears minimal and is integrated into the lower fuselage. Overall, the design is highly stylized, blending elements of both aviation and botanical forms.
description: A stylized airplane with a slender fuselage, leaf-like wings and tail, and a pink and purple color palette. The design merges aviation with organic, botanical motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, leaf-like wings and split vertical stabilizer, with the cockpit canopy visible at the top center.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, raised cockpit, and the layered, jagged wing and tail structures.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full wingspan, organic wing shapes, and the arrangement of the tail and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the profile of the wings, tail, and cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with long, straight, and jagged-edged wings resembling leaves; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with two upward-curving stabilizers and additional leaf-like extensions.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Minimal fixed landing gear integrated into the lower fuselage; single main gear visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat cockpit with a rounded, enclosed canopy at the front of the fuselage.
